title: Introduction to artificial intelligence for trainers
summary: Gain the foundational knowledge about the principles of artificial intelligence (AI) and how it's used in educational settings.

sections.title: Introduction to artificial intelligence for trainers
sections.summary: Gain the foundational knowledge about the principles of artificial intelligence (AI) and how it's used in educational settings.

lessons.title: A guide to artificial intelligence
lessons.content_md:
This module explores fundamental concepts in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/a-guide-to-artificial-intelligence/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Tailoring trainings with AI
lessons.content_md:
This module explores the dynamic integration of artificial intelligence (AI) in education.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/tailoring-trainings-with-ai/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Exploring artificial intelligence in action
lessons.content_md:
This module explores various subsets within artificial intelligence (AI) such as natural language processing (NLP), computer vision, and recommendation systems and discuss the integration of AI-powered tools into a learning environment.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/exploring-artificial-intelligence-in-action/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Use AI-powered tools for training
lessons.content_md:
This module contains sample activities that demonstrate how to integrate AI-powered tools into your learning environment.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/ai-powered-tools-for-teaching/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to artificial intelligence for trainers
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to artificial intelligence for trainers**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
